channel.title: +Myth on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Myth on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Parallel-reality-models
item.description: Intro There are two parallel models of reality - one is based on historical records, archeo/population-gentics etc..; and another is based on myths and hagiography. Both are valid in their respective areas (the former when it comes to facts; and the latter when it comes to ritual performance and sentimental self-cultivation). The pramANa-s are different in either case; and agreement on pramANa-s is fundamental to further vAda-s; as the ancients held.
